description: Expected API paths from a single-stage `vespasian scan` of the REST API target (LAB-3890 T2, gap A1). Unlike rest-api (two-stage crawl+generate), this exercises the scan command's full pipeline end-to-end. /api/subscribe is served ONLY as a static HTML <form> action (never linked or fetched), so its presence proves the analyze.ExtractForms augmentation ran inside scan. Parameter names may vary ({userId} vs {id}); validate_path_coverage matches params positionally.
